props.ChoiceText: What began as criminal work crossed a line into killing, and afterward there was no pretending otherwise.
props.ChoiceBio: One killing in the dark changed what kind of criminal you could still pretend to be.

0.TransitionText: Because one killing in the dark changed what kind of criminal you could still pretend to be, crime remained your road, only darker than before.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because one killing in the dark changed what kind of criminal you could still pretend to be, violence for hire began to look like the honest version of what you had become.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because one killing in the dark changed what kind of criminal you could still pretend to be, murder made subtler criminal life impossible.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Assassin, but you may remain on your current path instead.
